    ✓ formats bytes (2 ms)
    ✓ formats kilobytes (1 ms)
    ✓ formats megabytes
    ✓ handles zero
    ✓ handles negative values (1 ms)

    ✓ hashes strings (3 ms)
    ✓ hashes buffers (1 ms)
    ✓ returns consistent results
    ✓ handles empty input (1 ms)

  PolyglotExecutor
    ✓ executes javascript (45 ms)
    ✓ executes python (38 ms)
    ✓ executes shell (12 ms)
    ✓ enforces timeout (1003 ms)
    ✓ enforces byte cap (22 ms)
    ✓ handles missing runtime (1 ms)
    ✓ cleans up temp dirs (15 ms)
    ✓ strips dangerous env vars (8 ms)
    ✓ backgrounds long processes (2005 ms)
    ✓ kills process tree on timeout (1008 ms)

  ContentStore
    ✓ indexes content (12 ms)
    ✓ searches with BM25 (8 ms)
    ✓ searches with trigram fallback (15 ms)
    ✓ deduplicates chunks (5 ms)
    ✓ filters by source (3 ms)
    ✓ handles empty queries (1 ms)
    ✓ respects max results (2 ms)
    ✓ returns snippets with context (4 ms)
    ✓ fuzzy matching via Levenshtein (18 ms)
    ✓ proximity reranking (6 ms)

 PASS  src/hooks/__tests__/routing.test.js
  routePreToolUse
    ✓ blocks curl stdout (1 ms)
    ✓ allows curl with -o flag (1 ms)
    ✓ blocks wget stdout
    ✓ allows wget with -O flag
    ✓ blocks WebFetch (1 ms)
    ✓ redirects gradle (1 ms)
    ✓ redirects maven
    ✓ blocks inline fetch()
    ✓ blocks requests.get
    ✓ injects routing into Agent prompts (1 ms)
    ✓ passes through unknown tools
    ✓ shows Bash guidance once (1 ms)
    ✓ shows Read guidance once
    ✓ strips heredoc content before matching (1 ms)
    ✓ strips quoted content before matching
    ✓ allows safe curl segments in chains (1 ms)

  SessionDB
    ✓ creates session (5 ms)
    ✓ inserts events (2 ms)
    ✓ retrieves events by session (3 ms)
    ✓ cleans up old sessions (8 ms)
    ✓ builds resume snapshot (4 ms)
